title: March 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 5''' is the 64th day of the year (65th in leap years). There are 301 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Paul Blackthorne]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Yuri Lowenthal]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[John Williams]] begins conducting and recording the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[musical score]].
*[[1979]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] begins.
*[[1989]] – [[Jake Lloyd]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Empire (TPB)|''Dark Empire'']] Trade Paperback Preview released.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Mac (computer)|Mac]]intosh platform.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 3]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 6|''Empire'' 6]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: R2-D2's Adventure]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Written Word]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] article published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2012]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Secrets]]'' released.
*[[2014]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 9]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'': "[[A Fool's Hope]]" and series finale "[[Family Reunion – and Farewell]]" air on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[Queen's Shadow]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[The Prequel Trilogy Read-Along Storybook and CD Collection]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Graphic Novel Adaptation]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 7: Dark Droids]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: Dark Droids: D-Squad (TPB)|''Star Wars: Dark Droids: D-Squad'' trade paperback]] published.
*2024 – ''[[The High Republic: Defy the Storm]]'' published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic: Defy the Storm (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Defy the Storm'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 1|''Jedi Knights'' 1]] published.
*2025 – "[[RJ Learns to Fly]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
